mapper.select:
SELECT wave_cd as waveCd, wave_nm as waveNm
FROM TB_WAVE_INFO WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT pu_cd as puCd, pu_nm as puNm
FROM TB_PU_INFO WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT WAVE_NM AS waveNm, ISNULL([FAB_IN], 0) AS fabIn, ISNULL([B_1st], 0) AS b1st, ISNULL([B_2st], 0) AS b2st, ISNULL([B3st], 0) AS b3st,
ISNULL([B4st], 0) AS b4st, ISNULL([B5st], 0) AS b5st, ISNULL([PGIN], 0) AS pgin, ISNULL([A_1st], 0) AS a1st, ISNULL([A_2st], 0) AS a2st,
ISNULL([A_3st], 0) AS a3st, ISNULL([A_4st], 0) AS a4st, ISNULL([A_5st], 0) AS a5st, ISNULL([FAB_OUT], 0) AS fabOut FROM ( -- 기준 정보 조합에 선택한 년도의 실제 목표 데이터를 매핑 SELECT w.WAVE_NM, p.PU_NM, ISNULL(t.TARGET_VAL, 0) AS TARGET_VAL FROM TB_WAVE_INFO w CROSS JOIN TB_PU_INFO p LEFT JOIN TB_KPI_TARGET t ON w.WAVE_CD = t.WAVE_CD AND p.PU_CD = t.PU_CD
) AS SourceTable PIVOT ( SUM(TARGET_VAL) FOR PU_NM IN ( [FAB_IN], [B_1st], [B_2st], [B3st], [B4st], [B5st], [PGIN], [A_1st], [A_2st], [A_3st], [A_4st], [A_5st], [FAB_OUT] ) ) AS PivotTable ORDER BY CASE WAVE_NM WHEN 'EUV' THEN 1 WHEN 'Arf_I' THEN 2 WHEN 'Arf_F' THEN 3 WHEN 'GUV' THEN 4 WHEN 'OUV' THEN 5 WHEN 'SUV' THEN 6 WHEN 'RUV' THEN 7 END

SELECT [YEAR] AS year , KPI_CD AS kpiCd , KPI_NM AS kpiNm , GUBUN AS gubun , KPI_VAL AS kpiVal , [1st_Sign] AS v1stSign , [1st_Val] AS v1stVal , [1st_Mon] AS v1stMon , [1st_UseYn] AS v1stUseYn , [2nd_Sign] AS v2ndSign , [2nd_Val] AS v2ndVal , [2nd_Mon] AS v2ndMon , [2nd_UseYn] AS v2ndUseYn , [3rd_Sign] AS v3rdSign , [3rd_Val] AS v3rdVal , [3rd_Mon] AS v3rdMon , [3rd_UseYn] AS v3rdUseYn , [4th_Sign] AS v4thSign , [4th_Val] AS v4thVal , [4th_Mon] AS v4thMon , [4th_UseYn] AS v4thUseYn , REG_ID AS regId , REG_DT AS regDt , MOD_ID AS modId , MOD_DT AS modDt FROM tb_kpi_m WHERE 1=1 order by kpicd asc
